findings.name: Telekinetic Savant
findings.mechanic: Swift Action recovery path already counts owned Telekinetic Savant selections as per-encounter uses and recovers one spent [Telekinetic] Force Power without spending a Force Point.
evidence: Force suite UI Telekinetic Savant picker and descriptor guard

findings.name: Telekinetic Prodigy
findings.mechanic: The Force Power selection step now suppresses the old Prodigy-only retroactive slot trigger. Prodigy grants its extra [Telekinetic] slot only when the current Force Training selection includes Move Object.

automationBoundary.Telekinetic Savant: Fully wired for force-suite recovery workflow; still depends on power cards accurately tagging [Telekinetic] powers.
automationBoundary.Telekinetic Prodigy: Corrects current runtime over-granting. The exact later-Wisdom/same-Force-Training historical caveat requires per-Force-Training selection provenance if that is not already stored. This fix prevents a talent-pick-only Prodigy slot and keeps the slot tied to current Force Training + Move Object selection.
